# Repository AI Context

> This repository centralizes all developer guidelines and AI instructions in the `.ai/` directory.

## Core Documentation
- [Architecture](.ai/ARCHITECTURE.md): Overview of packages and data flow.
- [Coding Style](.ai/CODING_STYLE.md): Architectural patterns, formatting, and language-specific idioms.
- [Testing Rules](.ai/TESTING_RULES.md): Framework requirements and coverage standards.
- [Review Guidelines](.ai/REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md): Strict criteria for PR reviews.

## Tech Stack
- **Backend:** Go, GraphQL (gqlgen), Postgres, Flyway.
- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, USWDS.
- **Infrastructure:** Docker, Faktory, AWS.
